//===== rAthena Script =======================================
//= Costume Capsule
//===== Description: =========================================
//= 100,000 Zeny per client-compatible random costume.
//============================================================

prontera,155,227,4	script	Costume Capsule#EA	99,{
	mes "[Costume Capsule]";
	mes "Each draw costs 100,000 Zeny.";
	mes "Every result is supported by this client ItemInfo.";
	mes "Duplicate results are possible.";
	next;
	.@choice = select("All costumes:Upper head:Middle head:Lower head:Garments:Multi-slot / other:Close");
	if (.@choice == 7)
		close;

	.@price = 100000;
	switch (.@choice) {
	case 1:
		.@item = .CAll[rand(getarraysize(.CAll))];
		break;
	case 2:
		.@item = .CUpper[rand(getarraysize(.CUpper))];
		break;
	case 3:
		.@item = .CMiddle[rand(getarraysize(.CMiddle))];
		break;
	case 4:
		.@item = .CLower[rand(getarraysize(.CLower))];
		break;
	case 5:
		.@item = .CGarment[rand(getarraysize(.CGarment))];
		break;
	case 6:
		.@item = .CMulti[rand(getarraysize(.CMulti))];
		break;
	}

	if (Zeny < .@price) {
		mes "[Costume Capsule]";
		mes "You need 100,000 Zeny.";
		close;
	}

	if (!checkweight(.@item,1)) {
		mes "[Costume Capsule]";
		mes "Your inventory is full or too heavy.";
		close;
	}

	Zeny -= .@price;
	getitem .@item,1;
	logmes "[EA_COSTUME] aid="+getcharid(3)+" cid="+getcharid(0)+" item="+.@item+" price="+.@price;
	mes "[Costume Capsule]";
	mes "You received ^0055FF"+getitemname(.@item)+"^000000.";
	close;

OnInit:
	setarray .CAll[0],5909,5912,5914,5915,5979,5980,15843,15858,15877,15881,15882,15889,15905,15953,18740,18742,18743,18744,19158,19289,19291,19292,19294,19424,19459,19464,19466,19472,19500,19501,19502,19503,19504,19505,19506,19507,19508,19509,19510,19511,19512,19513,19514,19515,19516,19517,19518,19519,19520,19521,19522,19523,19524,19525,19526,19527,19528,19529,19530,19531,19532,19533,19534,19535,19536,19537,19538,19539,19540,19541,19542,19543,19544,19545,19546,19547,19548,19549,19550,19551;
	setarray .CAll[80],19552,19553,19554,19555,19556,19557,19558,19559,19560,19561,19562,19563,19564,19565,19566,19567,19568,19569,19570,19571,19572,19573,19574,19575,19576,19578,19579,19580,19581,19584,19585,19586,19587,19590,19598,19599,19600,19601,19602,19603,19604,19605,19606,19608,19612,19613,19617,19618,19621,19624,19625,19629,19630,19632,19633,19634,19635,19636,19637,19638,19639,19643,19650,19651,19653,19654,19656,19667,19668,19673,19675,19676,19677,19678,19682,19683,19685,19687,19697,19702;
	setarray .CAll[160],19704,19706,19707,19708,19710,19712,19713,19716,19719,19721,19722,19729,19731,19732,19733,19734,19735,19736,19737,19738,19739,19742,19745,19746,19748,19750,19751,19761,19764,19765,19768,19772,19775,19777,19778,19779,19780,19781,19782,19783,19784,19785,19786,19789,19790,19791,19792,19793,19794,19795,19796,19797,19798,19799,19800,19802,19803,19806,19807,19809,19815,19816,19821,19823,19824,19825,19826,19827,19828,19829,19830,19831,19833,19835,19836,19839,19843,19844,19845,19846;
	setarray .CAll[240],19847,19848,19849,19850,19851,19852,19856,19857,19858,19859,19860,19861,19862,19863,19864,19865,19866,19867,19868,19871,19873,19875,19876,19877,19878,19881,19882,19883,19884,19885,19886,19887,19888,19889,19894,19895,19902,19903,19910,19913,19917,19918,19919,19920,19922,19925,19929,19930,19931,19932,19934,19935,19936,19937,19938,19939,19941,19951,19954,19955,19959,19960,19977,19978,19979,19980,19982,19983,19984,19985,19990,19992,19993,19996,19999,20000,20001,20002,20003,20004;
	setarray .CAll[320],20008,20014,20016,20017,20021,20022,20025,20026,20027,20028,20031,20032,20033,20034,20036,20047,20048,20049,20050,20053,20054,20057,20062,20063,20064,20067,20068,20071,20073,20074,20079,20085,20086,20087,20088,20089,20090,20091,20092,20093,20094,20095,20096,20097,20098,20099,20105,20108,20110,20111,20112,20114,20115,20118,20119,20120,20121,20125,20130,20132,20133,20137,20138,20139,20140,20142,20145,20146,20147,20148,20153,20154,20155,20157,20158,20159,20160,20161,20162,20163;
	setarray .CAll[400],20167,20171,20172,20173,20174,20175,20177,20178,20179,20180,20181,20182,20183,20184,20186,20190,20191,20192,20193,20195,20196,20197,20198,20199,20200,20201,20202,20203,20204,20205,20206,20207,20208,20210,20211,20212,20218,20221,20222,20223,20224,20225,20226,20227,20228,20230,20231,20232,20233,20234,20237,20239,20240,20242,20243,20244,20246,20247,20249,20255,20256,20257,20259,20263,20264,20266,20267,20268,20271,20272,20273,20277,20278,20279,20281,20283,20284,20285,20286,20287;
	setarray .CAll[480],20290,20295,20298,20299,20300,20302,20304,20305,20311,20315,20316,20318,20319,20324,20325,20328,20329,20330,20335,20339,20340,20341,20342,20344,20348,20349,20350,20351,20352,20353,20354,20355,20356,20357,20358,20359,20360,20361,20362,20363,20364,20365,20366,20367,20368,20369,20370,20371,20372,20373,20374,20379,20380,20381,20388,20394,20395,20396,20397,20398,20399,20404,20405,20407,20413,20430,20432,20433,20437,20439,20440,20441,20443,20446,20447,20448,20449,20450,20451,20452;

}
